title: Fix Memory Management Bugs
bug_descriptions: array_push: writes to arr.ptr (offset 0) every time instead of arr.ptr + arr.count * 4
array_get: reads from arr.ptr + index (byte offset) instead of arr.ptr + index * 4 (i32 offset)
Missing free(arr.ptr) at end - memory leak (should use defer)
array_print: print() adds a newline each call, so printing separator and value separately produces wrong output - must build a single string and print once
